alert: Cache-backed pages are slow and database read load has increased.
root_cause: database read replica disabled causing cache refill latency

evidence_descriptions.inspect_metrics:cache: Cache hit rate is moderate, but refill latency is high.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_metrics:database: Database read latency and primary read utilization are elevated.

logs: WARN read replica routing disabled; serving reads from primary

expected_action_pattern: resolve_incident(database read replica disabled causing cache refill latency, enable database read replica)
distractors: Cache latency itself is healthy; slow refills come from database primary read pressure.
